summary.sosovalue: Community sentiment around SoSoValue is predominantly positive and enthusiastic, driven by ongoing airdrop farming, limited-time tasks like 'Her Comeback: Merge & Story' for up to 3,000 EXPs, and Season 2 eligibility updates assuring high chances even for low-completion users (15%-100%) as long as no bots or illegal activity. Key discussions revolve around daily check-ins, on-chain tasks, snapshots happening randomly, staking $SOSO for boosts (up to 11x SSI rewards and 40% trading fee discounts on SoDEX), Buildathon starting May 1st with $10K USDC grants, and influencers promoting it as the next big opportunity post-MegaEth. Metrics include high engagement on promotional posts (e.g., 428 likes, 108 replies on farming guides; 160 likes on task alerts), referrals flooding comments for 5% SoPoints boosts, and data citations for ETF flows showing net outflows ($138M BTC, $87M ETH) highlighting SoSoValue's role as a trusted analytics source amid sideways markets.
summary.sodex: Sentiment for SoDEX is highly bullish and urgent, positioned as a must-farm platform with Season 1 offering 150M $SOSO rewards (~$60M valuation), weekly 1M SoPoints shares, and upcoming W13 snapshot in ~48h sparking progress boasts and personal record discussions. Discussions focus on trading futures/swaps/vaults to accumulate points, using referrals (e.g., 'SOSO', 'SIGNNUP', 'MRCRYPTO') for lifelong 5% boosts, influencers calling it the 'next cook' after MegaEth, and integrations like perp DEX volume rankings ($30M daily). Engagement metrics shine with top posts at 428 likes/23 reposts/108 replies, 107 likes/20 reposts on snapshot alerts, 129 likes on related tasks, and Vietnamese community updates on crypto news alongside SoDEX mentions.
summary.ssi: SSI (SoSoValue Indexes) garners neutral to positive sentiment in niche discussions, primarily as a utility for boosts (e.g., SSI Boost Active, staking for up to 11x rewards, MAG7.SSI metrics like 13.92 price/-1.01% 24h/-23.94% 1Y), verification roles (>100 SSI/$SOSO on Base/Eth), and data insights (e.g., ssiGameFi +10% 24h, ETH restaking flows). Key talks include staking MAG77.SSI as a 'real user' badge, Discord verification, and integrations in Buildathon APIs/research terminal. Limited standalone buzz with low engagement (e.g., 8 likes on staking post, 2 likes on GameFi), mostly embedded in SoSoValue/SoDEX convos; no major controversies or hype spikes.
